в”•в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ҲвҠ·

*[ рҹ‘‘ BUSINESS OWNER COMMANDS ]*
- *.applicants [Business Name]* вҖ” View a list of players who applied for a job.
- *.hire @user [Business Name]* вҖ” Accept an applicant to your staff.
- *.fire @user [Business Name]* вҖ” Terminate a worker's contract.
- *.setsalary @user [Amount]* вҖ” Set specific pay for a human worker.
- *.work > [Business Name]* вҖ” Perform active shifts for maximum profit.
- *.paytax [Business Name]* вҖ” Pay daily tax (Missing = +2% Tax Rate).
- *.collect* вҖ” Claim passive income and pay all employee wages.
- *.buysecurity [Type] [Business Name]* вҖ” Buy security to protect your business.
- *.insure [Business Name]* вҖ” One-time protection against foreclosure or bankruptcy.
- *.business info [Business Name]* вҖ” View business details and stats.
- *.lawyer hire* вҖ” Hire a lawyer to represent you in court ($50k).
- *.lawyer list* вҖ” View available lawyers and their fees.

*[ рҹ‘· WORKER & APPLICANT COMMANDS ]*
- *.business list* вҖ” View all registered businesses and hiring status.
- *.apply [Business Name]* вҖ” Submit your application to the owner.
- *.quit* вҖ” Resign from your current job immediately to look for a new one.
- *.mysalary* вҖ” Check your current pay rate and pending earnings.
- *.work* вҖ” Generate revenue for your employer to earn your cut.
- *.myjobs* вҖ” View your current job and salary.

*[ рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ GANG OPERATIONS & EXTORTION ]*
_Gangs target private player-owned businesses for profit. Default jobs are off-limits._
- *.gang create [Name]* вҖ” Form a criminal organization ($500k).
- *.shakedown [Business Name]* вҖ” Demand protection money from an owner.
- *.raid [Business Name]* вҖ” Attempt to steal a portion of the business vault.
- *.quitgang* вҖ” Leave your current gang immediately.
- *.gang invite @user* вҖ” Invite a player to join your gang.
- *.gang kick @user* вҖ” Remove a member from your gang.

*[ рҹҸӣпёҸ GOVERNMENT & JUDICIAL ]*
- *.taxrate [Amount]* вҖ” (Gov) Set the base global tax percentage.
- *.sue @user [Amount]* вҖ” (Public) File a legal case against a player/owner.
- *.jury [CaseID] [Guilty/Innocent]* вҖ” (Public) Vote in a court trial.
- *.seize [Business Name]* вҖ” (Judge) Forcibly liquidate an asset.
- *.investigate [Plot]* вҖ” (Police) Scan for gang activity or illegal permits.
- *.court list* вҖ” View active court cases.
- *.court attend [CaseID]* вҖ” Attend a court trial as a witness.

*[ рҹҸў STARTING A BUSINESS ]*
1. *.buyland* вҖ” System assigns the next available automated plot.
2. *.getpermit [Plot]* вҖ” Legal authorization to build on that plot.
3. *.build [Type] [Plot]* вҖ” Constructs the facility (Office, Shop, etc.).
4. *.buyasset [Name]* вҖ” Registers the company name and activates ownership.

*[ ! ] REALISM COMPLIANCE*
- *Tax Penalty:* Missing .paytax = +2% Tax Rate increase every 24h.
- *Foreclosure:* Missing 3 consecutive taxes = Asset Deletion & Land Reset.
- *48H Shield:* The *Iron Gate* provides a hard lock against gangs for 2 full days.
- *Worker Strike:* Missing 3 salary payments = Workers/Bots stop producing.

(?) Full Command List: .guide

The `.registerlawid` command could show the following information:

- *ID Number*: A unique identifier for the law enforcement officer
- *Name*: The officer's name
- *Rank*: The officer's rank (e.g. Judge, Administrator, Law Enforcement Officer)
- *Group*: The group name (e.g. Court, Administration, Law Enforcement)
- *Age*: The officer's age
- *Registration Date*: The date they registered as a law enforcement officer
- *Permissions*: A list of permissions and commands they have access to

Example:

*Law Enforcement ID*
ID Number: LEO1234
Name: John Doe
Rank: Law Enforcement Officer
Group: Law Enforcement
Age: 30
Registration Date: 2023-02-15
Permissions: .arrest, .fine, .enforce

For Lead Admins, the ID could show additional information:

- *Admin Level*: The level of admin access they have
- *Sudo Permissions*: A list of sudo commands they have access to

Example:

*Lead Admin ID*
ID Number: ADMIN1234
Name: Jane Doe
Rank: Lead Admin
Group: Administration
Age: 35
Registration Date: 2022-01-01
Admin Level: 5
Sudo Permissions: .sudo, .appoint, .remove

                      RELUCTANT WIFE рҹҺҖрҹ’ҳ

Chapter 57,58&59

вҳ…

"Monica, thatвҖҷs enough!" McKenzieвҖҷs voice thundered across the office.

That sharp tone jolted Monica out of her trance.

"Are you out of your mind? This is completely unacceptableвҖ”especially in a workplace!" His voice was stern, cutting through the silence. "IвҖҷm your boss, Monica, not some man youвҖҷre trying to impress on a date."

McKenzie stood from his chair, his tall frame casting a shadow over her. The disappointment in his eyes made her shrink inside.

"I donвҖҷt know whatвҖҷs gotten into you, but I expect professionalism from all my employeesвҖ”especially from my personal secretary. Whatever thisвҖҰ thing is, it ends right now."

He exhaled deeply, trying to rein in his anger.

"YouвҖҷre good at your job, Monica. DonвҖҷt throw it all away over emotions you canвҖҷt control. And for the recordвҖ”my wifeвҖҷs beauty isnвҖҷt something for you to compare yourself to. SheвҖҷs the woman I love, and I wonвҖҷt tolerate anyone speaking ill of her."

His words hit hard, his gaze unwavering.

"IвҖҰIвҖҷm sorry, sir. I didnвҖҷt meanвҖ”"

McKenzie lifted a hand, stopping her mid-sentence. "Just focus on your work. ThatвҖҷs all I expect from you."

Monica quickly bent down, grabbing her clothes and slipping them back on in silence. Her hands trembled slightly as she buttoned her blouse.

"I donвҖҷt know what came over me," she whispered hoarsely. "IвҖҷm really sorry, boss."

Without waiting for a response, she turned and hurried out, slamming the door behind her.

Inside her own office, she locked the door and sank into her chair. The tears came fastвҖ”hot and unstoppable.

She had embarrassed herself in front of the one man she loved. Now, she couldnвҖҷt even imagine facing him again.

He didnвҖҷt see her as a woman. Just an employee. Nothing more.

And it broke her.

From the first day she started working for McKenzie, sheвҖҷd been drawn to him. Every smile, every calm wordвҖ”sheвҖҷd fallen deeper. But he never saw her the way she saw him.

Why did it hurt so much? Was it because he chose someone younger? Or because he rejected her so easily?

She didnвҖҷt know.
All she knew was that her heart achedвҖ”and the tears wouldnвҖҷt stop falling.

BACK IN MCKENZIEвҖҷS OFFICEвҳ…

McKenzie sank into his chair and tried to concentrate on the stack of files before him, but his mind refused to cooperate. MonicaвҖҷs wordsвҖ”and her actionsвҖ”kept looping in his head like a broken record.

Had he been too harsh on her?
Maybe. But she had crossed a line, and he couldnвҖҷt just overlook it. She needed to understand her boundaries, and he had made sure she did.

Still, the whole thing left a bitter taste in his mouth.
How was he supposed to know sheвҖҷd been harboring feelings for him all this time? She was his secretary, not someone he ever imagined would see him that way.

He rubbed his temples, letting out a tired sigh. The thought of firing her flickered across his mind more than onceвҖ”but he couldnвҖҷt bring himself to do it. Monica was one of his best employees, sharp and dedicated. She had played a major role in keeping Roche Company running smoothly.

If anyone had told him that Monica would ever lose control like that, he would have laughed. She wasnвҖҷt reckless. She wasnвҖҷt unprofessional. Until now.

McKenzie leaned back in his chair, staring blankly at the ceiling. вҖңWhat the hell happened to her?вҖқ he muttered.

Aurora had warned him beforeвҖ”about people blurring lines, about emotions turning messy when mixed with business.
And, as usual, she was right.

He drew in a slow breath and forced his attention back to the documents on his desk. But no matter how hard he tried, his thoughts kept drifting away.

He exhaled softly. вҖңFocus, McKenzie,вҖқ he told himself.

And this time, he did.

REYNOLDS INVESTMENTвҳ…

"HereвҖҷs your coffee, sir," Adriana said quietly, setting the steaming cup on JasperвҖҷs desk.

Jasper glanced at the cup, then at her. вҖңThank you,вҖқ he muttered.

Adriana blinked. Did he just say thank you?
For a second, she thought sheвҖҷd misheard him. Jasper ReynoldsвҖ”the same man who could barely say good morningвҖ”just thanked her?

"Sir?" she asked, unsure.

вҖңI said thank you for the coffee,вҖқ Jasper repeated, a faint smile tugging at his lips.

Adriana nearly choked on her own surprise. Not only was he being politeвҖ”he was smiling. Actually smiling.

"Sir, are youвҖҰ feeling okay?" she blurted before she could stop herself.

He frowned slightly. вҖңWhy?вҖқ

вҖңBecause the boss I know doesnвҖҷt smile or thank people. You might want to check if you have a fever,вҖқ she muttered under her breath.

He raised an eyebrow, but she quickly looked away. вҖңDo you have anything else youвҖҷd like me to do for you?вҖқ she asked, trying to change the topic.

Jasper studied her for a second before shaking his head. вҖңNo.вҖқ

Adriana nodded and turned to leave, but before she could reach the door, his voice stopped her.

вҖңSpend some time with me.вҖқ

She froze, turning slowly. вҖңHuh?вҖқ

вҖңI meanвҖҰвҖқ Jasper cleared his throat, his tone softening. вҖңI have something I need you to do for me.вҖқ

Adriana folded her arms. вҖңReally? Because when I asked earlier, you said no. Make it make sense, sir.вҖқ

He ignored her sarcasm. вҖңI need you to cross-check this file. If thereвҖҷs any error, let me know.вҖқ

вҖңSure,вҖқ she replied. вҖңIвҖҷll take it to my officeвҖ”вҖқ

вҖңYou can do it here,вҖқ Jasper interrupted. вҖңNo need to move around when you can just sit here.вҖқ

Adriana narrowed her eyes but didnвҖҷt argue. She gathered the file and sat on the couch across from him, flipping through the papers.

Jasper leaned back in his chair, silently watching her. A small smile crept to his lips before he caught himself.

вҖңDidnвҖҷt think itвҖҷd be this hard,вҖқ he muttered under his breath, adjusting his tie.

вҖңWhat was that, sir?вҖқ Adriana asked, glancing up.

вҖңNothing,вҖқ he said quickly, pretending to focus on his laptop.

But the truth was, Jasper ReynoldsвҖ”the man known for his icy composureвҖ”couldnвҖҷt seem to take his eyes off the woman sitting quietly in his office.

ROCHE EMPIRE

The car pulled into the parking lot, and Abby and Ruby stepped out. Ruby hurried to open the door for Aurora, who gracefully got out.

вҖңThank you, Ruby,вҖқ Aurora said with a soft smile. Ruby returned it before glancing up to see Nanny Celia waiting by the mansion entrance.

вҖңNanny,вҖқ Aurora called, walking over. Nanny Celia rushed forward and wrapped her in a tight hug, surprising her.

вҖңI saw what happened to you online, dear. IвҖҷm so sorry I wasnвҖҷt there to protect you,вҖқ Nanny Celia said, her voice thick with worry.

Aurora sighed gently. вҖңItвҖҷs okay, Nanny. I know if you were there, youвҖҷd have done everything to shield me from those paparazzi. McKenzie came just in time to help me.вҖқ

Nanny Celia pulled back, scanning her carefully. вҖңYouвҖҷre not hurt, are you? No injuries from that chaos?вҖқ

вҖңIвҖҷm fine,вҖқ Aurora reassured her. вҖңJust a little bump on my head. McKenzie had it treated already.вҖқ

Nanny Celia exhaled in relief. вҖңThank heavens. I made chicken sausage pepper soup with apple drink. Would you like some?вҖқ

Aurora was already full but didnвҖҷt want to disappoint her. вҖңOf course,вҖқ she said warmly.

They walked inside, and Nanny Celia called to a maid. вҖңSet the food on the dining table,вҖқ she instructed. The maid nodded and hurried off.

вҖңYouвҖҷll love it,вҖқ Nanny Celia said proudly. Aurora smiled and took a seat in the dining room.

Moments later, the maid returned with a tray and served the meal. The rich aroma filled the air, instantly making AuroraвҖҷs mouth water.

She picked up her spoon and took a tasteвҖ”the familiar burst of flavor spread across her tongue.

вҖңHow is it?вҖқ Nanny Celia asked eagerly.

вҖңAs perfect as always,вҖқ Aurora said, smiling.

Nanny Celia beamed, pleased. вҖңGood. You should eat up and rest afterward.вҖқ

Aurora nodded, taking another bite, savoring the warmth that spread through her. 

REYNOLDвҖҷS INVESTMENT

Adriana had been working tirelessly, her eyes scanning through pages of figures and contracts. At some point, exhaustion took over. She didnвҖҷt even realize when her eyelids fluttered shut and she drifted into sleepвҖ”right there on JasperвҖҷs leather couch.

Jasper looked up from his laptop and paused when he saw her. A small smile tugged at his lips. The sight was oddly endearing. Her hair had fallen across her face, and he couldnвҖҷt help but whisper to himself, вҖңWowвҖҰ cute.вҖқ

He shut his laptop quietly and walked over to her. Watching her this close, he felt something strange stir in him. Had she always looked this beautiful? Or was he just seeing her differently now?

Her face looked softвҖ”innocent almostвҖ”and her long lashes brushed her cheeks like feathers. But what caught his attention most were her eyes, those deep blue eyes he had seen earlier that day. Something about them felt oddly familiar. His chest tightened.

Where have I seen eyes like that before? he wondered. His head began to spin for a second, a blur of something he couldnвҖҷt quite recall, before the thought faded completely. Maybe it was nothing. Maybe he was imagining things.

A tiny strand of hair stuck to her face from sweat. She mustвҖҷve worked herself to the bone. Gently, Jasper reached out to move it away, his hand hovering near her cheek. But before he could touch herвҖ”

AdrianaвҖҷs eyes snapped open. Instinct took over. Her fist shot up before she even processed who was standing there.

The punch landed squarely on JasperвҖҷs face.

He stumbled backward with a groan, clutching his jaw.

Adriana blinked rapidly, trying to make sense of what just happened. Then her heart dropped when she realizedвҖ”sheвҖҷd just punched her boss.

вҖңOh my God, sir! IвҖҷm so sorry! I didnвҖҷt know it was youвҖ”I swear! I justвҖ”вҖқ she stammered.

вҖңAhhвҖҰвҖқ Jasper winced in pain, rubbing his face. Adriana quickly knelt beside him, reaching out to help, but he grabbed her wrist sharply.

вҖңDonвҖҷt you dare lay that hand on me,вҖқ he snapped through clenched teeth.

She froze. Why was he even beside her in the first place? Was he trying toвҖ”? No. Her thoughts scattered when Jasper groaned again in pain.

Without thinking, she rushed to his drawer, grabbed an ointment and a small plaster, then hurried back.

вҖңI said donвҖҷt touch me!вҖқ Jasper barked.

Adriana ignored him and leaned closer until their breaths mingled in the small space between them.

вҖңIf I donвҖҷt touch you, how else do you expect me to treat your face?вҖқ she said firmly. вҖңPlease, just let me do it. I canвҖҷt sit here feeling guilty when I caused this.вҖқ

Her tone softened the edge in his anger. He let out a frustrated sigh but didnвҖҷt stop her this time.

Adriana gently dabbed the ointment on his cheek, trying to ignore how close they were. His skin was warmer than she expected, smoothвҖ”almost too soft. She pressed the small plaster carefully over the tiny cut and stepped back quickly once she was done.

вҖңThere,вҖқ she said quietly, avoiding his gaze. вҖңAll done. I really am sorry, sirвҖҰ for sleeping off here, and forвҖҰ punching you.вҖқ

Jasper exhaled and straightened up. вҖңItвҖҷs fine,вҖқ he muttered, though his tone was stiff. He walked back to his desk and sat down, trying to collect what was left of his pride.

вҖңDid you finish cross-checking the file?вҖқ he asked without looking at her.

вҖңYes, sir,вҖқ she said meekly.

вҖңGood. Drop it on my desk and leave.вҖқ

Adriana nodded, gathered the documents from the couch, and placed them neatly on his table. As she turned to go, she could still feel his eyes on her backвҖ”watching her every step until the door closed behind her.

ROCHE EMPIRE

Magret descended the staircase slowly, her eyes glued to her phone screen as her fingers danced across the keyboard. A new SIM card was tucked into the deviceвҖ”her tool for anonymity.

The cameras flashed one last time, capturing memories that would last a lifetime. The Roche and Reynolds empires had celebrated not just weddings, but the triumph of love, and the bonds that made them whole.

вҖңOkay, a dance for both couples!вҖқ the MC announced, his voice echoing through the glittering hall.

Adriana reached out, smiling warmly at Aurora as they walked toward the stage together. вҖңYouвҖҷre looking so stunning,вҖқ she said, her eyes sparkling with genuine admiration.

вҖңYou too! And keep your son safe for my daughter,вҖқ Aurora replied playfully, and both women laughed, their joy ringing through the room.

McKenzie gently guided Aurora onto the stage, his hands firm yet tender around her waist, while Jasper did the same with Adriana, holding her close as they took their positions.

Soft, enchanting music began to play, filling the hall with a dreamy, romantic atmosphere. Both couples swayed slowly to the melody, their movements perfectly in sync, eyes locked on each other, lost in their own worlds amidst the applause and cheers.

вҖңI love you, Aurora Roche. YouвҖҷll forever be my other halfвҖҰ my rib,вҖқ McKenzie whispered, his voice low but steady, carrying the weight of years of love and devotion.

вҖңI love you too, HubbyвҖҰ McKenzie Roche,вҖқ Aurora replied, leaning up as their lips met in a tender, lingering kiss. The crowd erupted into cheers, clapping and whooping as golden confetti rained down on the couples, catching the lights and turning the stage into a sparkling dream.

Jasper and Adriana shared their own kiss, gentle at first, then growing more passionate, sealing their promises as the music continued. Laughter, applause, and joyful shouts filled the hall, blending with the sparkle and shimmer of the decorations.

Both families stood nearby, smiles radiant, hearts full. For a moment, nothing else matteredвҖ”just love, happiness, and the sheer joy of being together. It was a perfect celebration, the kind that would be remembered forever.

It was, after all, one happy ending.

They were usually close вҖ” always joking, always talking вҖ” but today his quietness stood out. Nora shifted awkwardly beside them, suddenly feeling like a third wheel.

вҖңI messaged you last night,вҖқ Alvin muttered, looking away. вҖңYou didnвҖҷt reply. I waited all night thinking youвҖҷd text me back.вҖқ

Aurora blinked, realizing she had completely forgotten after Mira had barged into her room and dragged her into cooking duty.

вҖңOh, that!вҖқ she gasped softly. вҖңIвҖҷm really sorry. I totally forgot.вҖқ

Alvin tried to stay annoyed, but one look at her apologetic face and his expression melted. вҖңYouвҖҷre forgiven,вҖқ he teased, вҖңbut only if you buy me lunch today.вҖқ

Aurora grinned. вҖңDeal.вҖқ

They both laughed, and then her gaze shifted to Nora, who looked paler than usual.

вҖңHey, you okay?вҖқ Aurora asked gently.

вҖңSheвҖҷs having stomach cramps,вҖқ Alvin explained before Nora could speak.

Aurora frowned in concern. вҖңYou shouldвҖҷve stayed home.вҖқ

вҖңIвҖҷll be fine,вҖқ Nora said weakly with a small smile.

Just then, a group of students hurried past them toward the main building. Alvin checked his watch. вҖңWe should go. Professor Harris doesnвҖҷt tolerate latecomers.вҖқ

Aurora nodded, adjusting her bag on her shoulder. вҖңLetвҖҷs move then.вҖқ

 CLASSROOMвҳ…

The lecturer was already in class when Aurora, Alvin, and Nora walked in. Students quickly scrambled to their seats as his sharp voice filled the room.

вҖңEveryone, bring out your assignments. IвҖҷll be collecting them right now.вҖқ

Aurora smiled, reaching into her bag and pulling out her neatly stapled pages вҖ” the same one Kenzie had helped her finish just last night. She passed it to Alvin, who, as class minister, went around collecting everyoneвҖҷs work.

вҖңDid you finish yours?вҖқ Aurora whispered to Nora.

вҖңYeah, before the cramps hit,вҖқ Nora replied weakly.

Aurora nodded and turned to Alvin, who was already holding a tall stack of papers.

вҖңDonвҖҷt forget mine,вҖқ she teased.

вҖңI wouldnвҖҷt dare,вҖқ Alvin smirked, taking hers and heading to the lecturerвҖҷs desk.

The lecturer glanced through the pile. вҖңGood. IвҖҷll grade these before tomorrowвҖҷs class. Some of you better pray you didnвҖҷt copy from last semesterвҖҷs notes again.вҖқ

A few students laughed nervously. Aurora stayed silent, feeling a flicker of pride вҖ” and guilt.

As the lecture continued, she could feel eyes on her. Stacy and Michelle, seated a few rows ahead, kept turning around to glare at her. Aurora rolled her eyes.

Jealous much? she thought.

When class finally ended, the lecturer reminded them, вҖңIвҖҷll return your graded assignments next class. Dismissed.вҖқ

Students began packing up. Alvin slung his bag over his shoulder and leaned toward Aurora.

вҖңYou still owe me lunch, remember?вҖқ

Aurora chuckled. вҖңI know, I know. IвҖҷll treat you today.вҖқ

вҖңIвҖҷm coming too,вҖқ Nora added, standing up slowly.

вҖңOf course you are,вҖқ Aurora smiled as the trio left the hall.

JASPER CONGLOMERATE вҖ“ CEOвҖҷS OFFICE

JasperвҖҷs grandmother leaned back in her chair with a satisfied smile after the interview. She had asked Adriana a dozen difficult questions вҖ” and the young woman had answered every one with confidence and grace.

вҖңIвҖҷm proud of you, son,вҖқ his grandmother said, turning to Jasper. вҖңYou did well in choosing the right person.вҖқ

Jasper flashed a grin, his perfect white teeth glinting under the office lights.
вҖңWhy then am I my fatherвҖҷs son?вҖқ he quipped, and she chuckled softly.

вҖңI should be going now,вҖқ she said, rising from her seat.

вҖңIвҖҷll tell the driver to drop you off. Bye, Granny,вҖқ Jasper replied, waving politely as she exited the office.

The moment the door clicked shut, his charming smile vanished. His expression turned sharp and cold.

вҖңWhatвҖҷs my schedule for today?вҖқ he asked in a low, commanding tone.

Adriana quickly opened the file she held and began reading out the dayвҖҷs itinerary. Her voice trembled slightly, but she kept going until she reached the end.

вҖңI didnвҖҷt hear any of that,вҖқ Jasper interrupted, leaning back in his chair. вҖңMind reading it again?вҖқ

Adriana frowned, snapping the file shut and placing it on the desk.
вҖңIвҖҷm not reading anything again,вҖқ she said firmly.

A dangerous smirk tugged at JasperвҖҷs lips.
вҖңYou know, my grandmother was wrong to praise you. You donвҖҷt deserve it.вҖқ

He stood up, his gaze hard and unflinching.
вҖңMaybe youвҖҷve forgotten that I own every part of you now.вҖқ

Adriana froze. вҖңWhat do you mean?вҖқ

Jasper reached into a drawer and pulled out a document вҖ” the one she had signed. He placed it in front of her, tapping it once with his finger.

вҖңRead it again.вҖқ

AdrianaвҖҷs eyes darted over the paper. Her voice shook as she read the words aloud:

Rule No. 1: You must be submissive to me.
Rule No. 2: I have full dominance over you.
Rule No. 3: I am your superior.

She looked up at him in disbelief. вҖңYou must be joking.вҖқ

Jasper chuckled darkly, spinning the dice in his hand as he leaned against his desk.
вҖңDoes it look like IвҖҷm joking? You signed those terms yourself вҖ” no one forced you. That means you do exactly as I say. If I want you in my house, youвҖҷll come. If I want you in my bed, youвҖҷll be there. My needs come first вҖ” always.вҖқ

AdrianaвҖҷs throat tightened. вҖңIвҖҷm not giving in to this. Never.вҖқ

вҖңThen get ready to pay one hundred million dollars,вҖқ Jasper said smoothly. вҖңWe both know you donвҖҷt have that kind of money. So, youвҖҷll work for me вҖ” for five years вҖ” until you do.вҖқ

Tears welled up in AdrianaвҖҷs eyes. вҖңI know why youвҖҷre doing this. If itвҖҷs because I hit you with a bottle and kicked you in the groin, then IвҖҷm sorry!вҖқ

вҖңIf youвҖҷd accepted earlier,вҖқ he replied coolly, вҖңnone of this would have happened. But nowвҖҰвҖқ he leaned closer, his voice dangerously calm, вҖңyouвҖҷre mine. My secretary. My cook. My rules.вҖқ

вҖңYou canвҖҷt do that!вҖқ she shouted, her voice breaking. вҖңI have a son to take care of!вҖқ

But Jasper was already walking out the door. He didnвҖҷt even look back.

CAFETERIA вҖ” SSC COLLEGE

The cafeteria buzzed with noise as students stood in a long queue, trays in hand, waiting for lunch. Aurora joined the line, smiling faintly as she scrolled through her phone. Just when it was almost her turn, Stacy appeared out of nowhere, snatched her tray, and boldly walked to the front.

AuroraвҖҷs eyes widened. вҖңWaitвҖ”what do you think youвҖҷre doing?вҖқ

Stacy turned with a mocking smirk. вҖңYou came late, and you still think you can stand in line like everyone else? Who do you think you are?вҖқ

Aurora crossed her arms. вҖңI think IвҖҷm someone who knows how to wait her turn. Unlike you.вҖқ

A few students nearby gasped softly. StacyвҖҷs smirk darkened.
вҖңWowвҖҰ look who suddenly grew a spine. Because you showed up with a new look, right? You think that transformation makes you better than us?вҖқ

Aurora clenched her jaw, trying to keep calm, but Stacy wasnвҖҷt done. She raised her voice so everyone could hear.

вҖңHave any of you wondered how Aurora suddenly showed up with a brand-new phone and fancy clothes? Or how sheвҖ”the girl who always failedвҖ”suddenly got the highest mark in the last assignment?вҖқ

The cafeteria grew quiet. Heads turned. Phones lifted, cameras ready.

вҖңDonвҖҷt call me a failure,вҖқ Aurora shot back, her voice trembling. вҖңI justвҖҰ didnвҖҷt have time to study before. My momвҖ”вҖқ

вҖңOh please!вҖқ Stacy cut in, laughing coldly. вҖңWe all know the truth. YouвҖҷve been sleeping with men for money. ThatвҖҷs how you afforded everything, right?вҖқ

The crowd gasped.

вҖңSay it, Aurora! Deny it if you can!вҖқ Stacy sneered.

AuroraвҖҷs lips parted, but no words came out. Her throat tightened, her hands shaking. Stacy smiled in triumph вҖ” her plan was working perfectly.

Then, from behind the crowd, a calm yet firm voice broke through the whispers.

вҖңSheвҖҷs definitely not into prostitution.вҖқ

Everyone turned toward the sound вҖ” the confident footsteps growing louder as the crowd parted slowlyвҖҰ

THEME; Spark Of Pleasureрҹ”Ҙ

CHAPTER 55вңһ56

By: Elena. 

вҖўвҲҳвҖўвҲҳвҖў
THIS STORY IS SIGNED, SO STAY THE F**K AWAY IF YOU'RE HERE TO COPY! рҹҳ•

LIKE BEFORE READING AND DROP A MEANINGFUL COMMENT AND SHARE AFTER READING рҹҷҢ

____________

Let's meet again tomorrow, if you complete my requirements. 

                                ***вҷЎ***

                 (вҖўрқҗғрқҗ”рқҗҢрқҗҢрқҗҳ;рқҗҲ рқҗӢрқҗҺрқҗ•рқҗ„ рқҗҳрқҗҺрқҗ”вҖў)

!!Yes... She knew she didn't deserve Newton after everything that happened five years ago on their 18th birthday.

It kept replaying in her head, and she picked up the pen to sign the divorce papers..... 

She signed the papers, and Jarvis smiled, collecting the papers from her.

"Thank you for signing the papers," Jarvis said with a crooked voice.

"I did what you asked me to do," Joanna said.

"Not all, I still have more requests," Jarvis said.

"And what's that?" Joanna asked

"You should leave the house you're no longer married to Newton, so leave," Jarvis muttered with a smirk.

"You're not serious, are you?" Joanna asked

"Does it look like I'm joking? You have to leave because your service here is no longer needed, you see." Jarvis said.

"I can't do that, I will wait to inform Newton. He needs to give me his permission before I leave, I'm serious," Joanna said.

"I guess you want it the hard way," Jarvis muttered, taking her hand before dragging her out.

Then she locked the door. She went upstairs and put all of Joanna's belongings into her luggage, then went downstairs and threw the luggage outside, then locked the door.

While Joanna kept banging the door, nevertheless, Jarvis didn't hear her.

Joanna cried for a while before she wiped her tears. She knew she had made a mistake by signing the papers, but she felt guilty for what had happened to Jarvis five years ago.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Jarvis sat on the chair with a bright smile on her face. She was just too happy.

Joanna signing the divorce papers and her being with Newton again everything was just so overwhelming.

She loved the way her sister would slowly abide by her will and she had been using what had happened five years ago against Joanna.

"My sister is sure crazy, a fool," she laughed murderously and stood up.

Then she walked to the kitchen, where she saw Alison making breakfast.

"What are you making?" she asked, and Alison looked at her. Her tone, everything, was just so different she immediately knew that it was Jarvis.

"Joanna said I should prepare mashed potatoes," Alison replied.

"I don't want that you can just prepare macaroni," Jarvis said.

"But I'm already preparing it," Alison said.

"Are you arguing with me already, huh?As you can see, the real owner of the house is back, so you will simply do what I asked you to do," Jarvis fired at her.

"My boss is not yet married to you, so I'll prepare the mashed potatoes," Alison said, but a slap landed on her cheek.

Jarvis walked to her and grabbed her hair... Alison cried in pain... Jarvis just smirked.

"Do you think I'm Joanna? Oh no! I'm Jarvis I'm different from my sister."Jarvis said, as she grabbed her hair harder.

Yeah, this woman here was so different from Joanna... She's a monster.

"Are you going to prepare the macaroni for me, or do you want it the hard way?" Jarvis asked.

"I'll prepare it," Alison quickly said.

"Good girl," Jarvis said and released her.

"If what I did gets to your boss, not only will I remove every strand of your hair, but I will also break your teeth," Jarvis muttered.

"Sure, I won't inform my boss," Alison muttered, and Jarvis smirked.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

BURIAL GROUND**

Mr. Fallon's body had already been buried, and Jimmy and Angel turned to leave when the reporters swarmed them.

*Sir, we have seen this girl with you on different occasions! 

*We just want to know who she is to you!

*You have always been single, so we wouldn't be surprised if she's your girlfriend!

*We just need you to say the word.

Jimmy looked at Angel, who was standing like a statue. This was the right moment for him to introduce her to the media, and then his friends would follow suit.

He grabbed her and gently placed his hand on her waist. Angel looked at him.

*Sir, we need an answer!

"You are all suspiciously right, but she's not my girlfriend, but my wife," Jimmy said, and Angel looked at him. He smiled back at her.

*What?

*When did you guys tie the knot?

*Was it after Mr. Fallon's death or before his death?"

"Actually, it was before my dad died, and he was aware of it... This girl here is my life... My woman, and I'll sacrifice the whole world for her," Jimmy said, and Angel didn't know when she smiled.

*Awwww!

*She's so lucky!

*Your wife is beautiful!

*But sir, we would want a real wedding!

"Sure, we will get married again, so I'll let you guys know when the date is actually fixed," Jimmy muttered.

*Thanks!

*Sir, just a kiss, please!

Angel's eyes widened when she heard that, and Jimmy moved his lips to her ear.

"Wifey, there is nothing bad in just a kiss," he muttered, then he cupped her face in his hand and placed a light yet tender kiss on her lips.

*At this rate, I think I'm going to faint.

*This is so amazing!

"If you wish, can we leave?" Jimmy asked.

*Sure!"

He took Angel's hand, and they walked and got into their car. Angel faced him.

"What was that you pulled over there? Do you know the video will go so viral?" Angel said.

"And I don't care I want the whole world to know that you're mine, that you're my woman, and don't tell me you didn't enjoy what I did out there," Jimmy asked.

Angel looked away from him and smiled.

"You see, you love it," Jimmy said.

"Stop dreaming," Angel said, and Jimmy chuckled.

In a secluded area, Mikel's phone popped, and the video of how Angel and Jimmy kissed showed on his phone.

Since she left... No, since he broke up with her, his life had been miserable. He regretted ever leaving her.

He cursed his mother for giving him a bad idea to let go of the woman who was ready to sacrifice her life for him.

He really lost a gem.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

SвҖўKвҖўJ HIGH SCHOOL**

The principal walked inside the hall and stood beside the pulpit, immediately the students saw her they kept quiet.

"Hello Everyone," the principal said, and the students just smiled.

"So as you all know, the year semester is coming to an end, and the seniors are graduating." The principal paused, then continued.

"This will be the first time we are going to be hosting our prom night with both the juniors and the seniors." The principal said, and the students murmured in excitement.

*Awnnn!!

*That's nice!!"

"We would only do this prom night if you all pass your exams excellently, so we would love you all to prepare for the exams, then the prom night. Remember, you all have to choose your partner, because there will only be one prom queen and a king." The principal said again.

"And good luck to whoever will be winning this year's king and queen." She said, and the students clapped.

*It's sure me and my partner!!

*No, it's I and my partner!! 

*Who can beat against me and my partner!!"

Piper just rolled her eyes on hearing that. The prom night hadn't even come, and they were already arguing about who was going to win. She saw Kiss and walked up to him.

"Hi." She said, and Kiss smiled before giving her a kiss on the cheek.

"The prom night, will you be participating?" Piper asked.

"I'll only participate if you score an A."Kiss said.

"What." Piper widened her eyes.

"Yeah.. Score an A, and you'll be my prom queen." Kiss said.

"Sure.. I'll try my best.. I'm studying already I'm always paying attention to the lectures." Piper said.

"I trust my girl."Kiss said.

"But you don't have to be rude what if I don't score an A?" Piper asked.

"I know my cutie doll  you will score an A." Kiss said.

"Do you trust me that much? Huh?" Piper asked.

"Yeah." Kiss replied, and Piper smiled. Then Kiss pulled her closer, inhaling her candy scent.

"I love your perfume." Kiss said.

"Is it the perfume you love, or my body?" Piper asked.

"Both." He replied.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

MOORE GROUP OF COMPANY**
 
Newton came out of the conference room, same as Leo. He picked up his phone and dialed Joanna's number, but it wasn't going through.

"Why are you feeling nervous?" Leo asked.

"Joanna isn't picking up my call," Newton replied, 

"She might be angry with you," Leo said with a wink.

"Come on, I didn't offend her at all, I'm not sure I did something wrong to her?" Newton said.

"Let me try calling her." Leo said. He also dialed Joanna's number, but it wouldn't go through.

"Did she pick up?" Newton asked.

"Same thing, it's not going through." Leo said.

"I guess I'll just have to go home. It's almost closing hour."Newton muttered. 

"Sure." Leo replied.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Newton came out from his car and rushed inside his mansion.

"Joanna." Newton called, but Jarvis stepped down the stairs.

"You're back," Jarvis asked, and Newton rolled his eyes. He recognized her immediately.

"Where's Joanna?" Newton asked.

"She left already," Jarvis said.

"What do you mean by that?" Newton asked.

"She said she's tired of this marriage, so that's why she left. I know you might think I'm lying, but check that out," Jarvis said, handling over the divorce papers to him.

Newton scrolled through the divorce papers and shook his head.

"It's not my Joanna... No, it can't be," Newton said, and Jarvis smirked.

"That's the fact, Newton... She left and signed the divorce papers... She claims you weren't treating her well, and she was tired of this hellish marriage," Jarvis said, and it was like she unlocked the beast in Newton, as he grabbed her and started choking her.

"I wouldn't repeat this again... Where's my wife?" Newton asked, choking her, and Jarvis could swear that if he should release her, there would surely be a mark on her skin.

"I swear to you, I don't know where she is... She just took her luggage and left," Jarvis said.

"She didn't leave on her own, I know you said something that made her leave... Now tell me, what did you say to her?" Newton asked with a cold voice.

"I just reminded her of an incident that occurred five years ago, that's all," Jarvis coughed as Newton released her.

He rushed out of the mansion immediately, and the rain started falling dangerously.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Joanna squatted on the floor with her luggage beside her, she was shivering as the rain hit her hard.

Her tears were invisible because of the rain.

She hates this life... Just when she thought she found her happiness, someone with whom she could collide, all this had to happen.

She hated herself for everything that had happened five years ago, but she hated herself more for signing the divorce papers.

She suddenly looked up and saw Newton standing beside her... Was she hallucinating? No, she wasn't, because he was really standing beside her.

She sprang up immediately, and Newton made to take a step towards her, but she stopped him.

"Stay away from me, Newton you'd probably hate me if you find out about what happened five years ago," Joanna said.

"I don't care," Newton said and took a step.

"I'm serious... Stay away from me," Joanna said, but he ignored her and ran to hug her.

Just the warmth of his embrace made her think about what had happened five years ago.

FLASHBACK BACKвҖў FIVE YEARS AGO**

It was their 18th birthday, and Joanna rushed inside the room to see her sister, Jarvis, sleeping soundly on their bed.

She rushed to her and shook her, then Jarvis blinked her eyes open.

"Today is our birthday, and you're sleeping today is supposed to be a memorable day for both of us," Joanna said.

"I'm not interested," Jarvis said, and she was about to sleep again when Joanna tapped her.

"Come on, let's go and make today a memorable day for both of us... We're no longer sweet teens, but we're youth now... It shows we're getting matured," Joanna said.

"Where do you suggest we go?" Jarvis asked.

"My friend recommended a club it's one of the best in town... We can go partying and enjoying our lives. Please, sis," Joanna pleaded.

"Sure," Jarvis said, and Joanna smiled.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

They went to the club and the waiter ended up serving them alcoholic drinks instead of non-alcoholic drinks that they had requested.

They ended up drinking more than expected, in fact they drank more than they shouldn't have.

"Jo.. I'm going to the restroom.. I can no longer hold it." Jarvis said drunkenly.

"Sure.. I'd just wait here." Joanna said and slammed her head on the table while Jarvis went ahead to use the restroom as she had said.

She went to the restroom and used the facilities, and she was about to come outside when she bumped into a man. 

She look up and her cute poppy innocence eyes met with a cold and dangerous face. 

They were two and she made to leave but they hold her hand and pushed her into the restroom then they locked the door. 

"What are you guys doing?." Jarvis tipsy voice said. 

"Shut up and let's do our business. " the two men said and started unbuttoning their shirts.. They ended up raping her. 

END OF FLASHBACK**

"Yeah, they raped my sister. If only I hadn't suggested that we go to the club, then they wouldn't have raped her. I am behind her misfortune. She hated the way their touches felt on her, and then she started sleeping with different men just so she couldn't feel their touches on her. She would have ended up with you, but her crave for sex didn't allow her to stay." Joanna shouted.

                            (вҖўрқ‘ӯрқ‘¶рқ‘№рқ‘¬рқ‘Ҫрқ‘¬рқ‘№вҖў)

"Piper, you can't leave me alone our love story isn't yet complete... Like I said, I'm not addicted to this darkness, so you'll have to come back to me, please."

The door opened, and the doctor stepped out.. 

____

Kiss wiped his tears as soon as he saw the doctor he then walked towards him.

"Doctor?" He called, and the doctor looked at him.

"How's she?" Kiss asked.

"Thank goodness you rushed her in on time the cut didn't enter deep into her, so she's fine." The doctor said, and Kiss breathed out a sigh of relief. 

"Can I go and see her now?" Kiss asked, and the doctor nodded.

Newton was about to follow Kiss when Joanna pulled him back

"Let him be, since he claims they are dating, just give them a little time." Joanna said, and Newton pulled her into a hug. 

"Did you know how I felt when I heard that Piper was being stabbed? She's the only family I have left besides Leo and Dorothy it was so heartbroken." Newton hiccups.

"She's fine, now." Joanna muttered, patting him.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Kiss entered, and he saw Piper's eyes were closed, and he didn't know when a tear escaped his eyes.

He slowly walked up to her and placed a light kiss on her forehead, where she was stabbed had been plastered already.

Piper suddenly opened her eyes they were tears in her eyes.

"Kiss." She called, and he wiped his tears to face her.

"I'm here for you, cutie doll."He muttered, and she smiled. 

"I thought I was not going to see you again, I thought....." She said, as tears rolled down her eyes

Kiss kissed the tears away.

"Don't say that, cutie doll you're here with me. I knew you were gonna come back for me I knew I had faith in you." Kiss said, and Piper made to stand up, but the pain struck her hard, and she fell back to the bed.

"Where's my brother?" Piper asked, and Kiss immediately remembered everything that transpired between them. He's outside. Kiss muttered.

"Did you tell him about us?" She asked. 

"I handled it already, but he looks quite annoyed with you."Kiss said, and Piper blinked.

"Did you see the person who stabbed you?" Kiss suddenly asked, and Piper suddenly remembered.

That hand she could remember it... It was Nelly's hand... She could feel the hand... The chemical Nelly poured on her skin really damaged her, and the swollen boils and peels... It was surely Nelly.

"I didn't see the person, but I'm suspecting someone."Piper muttered. 

"Who?" Kiss asked.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

SAME NIGHT, NELLY APARTMENT**

She entered her house, removed the mask, and threw it on the couch.

She smirked and went to her wardrobe to get the ointment she usually applied to her hand and face. She looked at her hands and scoffed.

"By now, it was supposed to be you in this condition, but I'm the one in it... The whole school thought I was a changed person, including Piper - what a fool! They didn't know I was just biding my time, waiting for the perfect moment to execute my plan... Humans are so gullible." She laughed maniacally. 

"Piper, I did say that if I couldn't have Kiss, no one would. But you didn't listen you chose to accept him as your boyfriend. But unfortunately, he can't be your boyfriend anymore... Rest in peace, dear Piper. Now, let's see how you're going to attend prom night with him. Kiss will have no choice but to ask me to be his prom queen... Nelly, ain't I good?" she said, about to apply the ointment when someone grabbed it and splashed it on her face.

Then, a welcoming slap landed on her - three consecutive ones. She looked up to see Kiss standing in front of her.

"And you think trying to hurt her would make me run back to you, huh? How can you be this cheap and heartless, wanting to take your fellow human's life?" Kiss asked.

"I don't know what you're saying," Nelly shouted.

"Oh, cut that crap," he snapped.

"You tried to hurt Piper you stabbed her, and you aren't even feeling any remorse. People like you deserve to be in jail." Kiss shouted. 

"Yeah, I don't feel remorse. I used to be Piper's friend, but she stole you away from me." Nelly shouted back at him.

"How? Remember, I was never yours to begin with." Kiss said.

"I used to love you, but you wouldn't even notice me all you see is Piper, Piper, and Piper, and I'm f**king tired. What do you see in her, huh? You turned me into what I am today... I turned into a devil because you didn't want to reciprocate my love. What could I have done? My heart chose you, but..."

"But my heart chose her from the very beginning, Nelly. I was never attracted to you, not even for a single bit. I never loved you." Kiss cut her off.

"Then you can reciprocate my love... Piper is dead already, so you can love me, huh? I promise you'll forget about her." Nelly said, trying to kiss him.

Kiss pushed her away.

"For your fucking information, Piper is not dead." Kiss shouted.

"What?" she asked.

"You heard me right she's not dead, and for what you've done, you're going to be arrested." Kiss said, and the police entered, handcuffed her, and dragged her away.

"No, no, no, Kiss, you can't do this to me you literally can't... I love you so much... So, please." Nelly shouted as the police put her in the van and drove off.

Kiss ruffled his hair, looking relieved that the ordeal was over.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

NEXT DAY, NEWTON APARTMENT**

Leo and Jarvis got down from the car, and Jarvis looked at Leo, who gave her a smile in return.

"Are you sure about this?" Jarvis asked, and Leo nodded.

"I'm sure you can do this, you need to."

"I have never been so nervous before in my entire life, like this," Jarvis muttered, and Leo held her hand.

"Does this relieve you a little bit?" Newton asked, and she nodded.

They walked into the mansion, where they met Alison.

"Is Joanna in?" Leo asked, and Alison nodded, then looked at Jarvis and shrugged. Jarvis walked up to her and held her hand.

"I'm sorry for what I did to you weeks back, can you forgive me?" Jarvis asked, and Alison looked at Leo, who nodded.

"I have forgiven you, I don't joke with Joanna, and you having the same face as Joanna is quite annoying," Alison replied.

"I'm really sorry," Jarvis said, and Alison pulled her into a hug.

"I have forgiven you, I hope we can become friends like I and Joanna."

"Do you want to be my friend?" Jarvis asked.

"That's if you're okay with it," Alison replied, and Jarvis beamed with a smile.

"I'd love to," Jarvis said, and Alison almost gasped.

"Was this Jarvis or a ghost?" she wondered. 

"Really," she asked, and Jarvis nodded.

"Friends then," Alison muttered, and Jarvis smiled.

Leo watched with amusement, clearly written on his face.

Joanna got down from the stairs, only to see Alison and Jarvis hugging each other. She walked closer to them and touched Alison's forehead. 

"Do you have a fever, you and Jarvis, together?" Joanna asked.

"She's now my friend," Alison said, and Joanna almost laughed.

"You're not serious, are you?" Joanna asked

Jarvis, who let go of Alison and walked to Joanna.

"Sis," Jarvis called, and Joanna shrugged.

"Are you here to mock me, that I'm pregnant for the wrong person, and I don't deserve to be pregnant? If yes, then leave."

"Wait, you're pregnant?? " She asked and Joanna nodded. 

Jarvis hugged her, and Jarvis was a bit startled.

"I'm going to be an aunt, a fucking aunt... Fans come and hear this I'm going to be an aunt," Jarvis screamed and kept hugging her.

"Is this Jarvis or someone else?" she wondered.

"Is this really my sister?" Joanna asked, and Jarvis nodded.

"Okay, I came to apologize, not to mock you, I'm sorry for everything, I mean everything single thing I have done to you, I'm sorry for taking advantage of you even when I knew you were never at fault for my rape, I'm deeply sorry," Jarvis said, and Joanna pulled her into a hug.

If only Jarvis knew how much she had been waiting for all this, if only she knew how much she wanted her back, if only she knew how much she had been waiting for her apologies.

"I'm also sorry, Jarvis I'm sorry... I guess I wasn't a good sister... If only I hadn't suggested we go to that club, then nothing would have caused a rift between us I'm also a bad sister, I guess."Joanna said, as tears ran out from her eyes. 

"I should be the one apologizing, but you stole the line again," Jarvis muttered, with tears also in her eyes.

"I'm sorry," Joanna muttered.

"I'm also sorry," Jarvis muttered, and the two sisters yet again hugged each other in a warm embrace, replacing all their lost moments away from each other. They were crying out their eyes.

Leo and Alison just watched the emotional reunion between the two identical sisters.

Newton also entered the mansion he was just returning from work.

"Okay, what's going on here?" Newton asked, cursing Joanna and Jarvis to break the hug.

"Two sisters' reunion," Leo said and climbed on his back.

"Hey, would you get down?" Newton asked.

"Why didn't you tell me that Joanna is pregnant and that you're going to be a father?" Leo asked.

"Who's going to be a father?" Jimmy said, as he stepped into the mansion with Angel. He actually came to introduce Angel to Newton.

"Good twosome," Newton rolled his eyes.

"Who's going to be a father?" Jimmy asked again.

"Who do you expect if not Newton? His wife is pregnant," Leo said, and Joanna just chuckled.

Angel walked to her and pulled her into a hug.

"Congratulations," Angel said with a smile.

"Thanks," Joanna said.

"Why am I seeing two faces?" Angel asked.

"Actually, she's my sister Jarvis," Joanna said, and Angel gasped.

"Wow, identical," she beamed.

"Yeah," Joanna said and placed a soft kiss on Joanna's cheeks

"Okay everyone, I came here because I want to introduce you all to my damsel," Jimmy muttered.

"Who, who stole this dummy heart?" Newton asked, and Jimmy walked towards her and grabbed her waist. Angel blushed.

"She's my pretty damsel, who came into my life unexpectedly," Jimmy said, and Angel smiled.

"Awwn," Joanna and Jarvis said in unison.

"This calls for celebrations," Leo muttered, and everyone walked to sit at the dining table.

"Let's toast to this good news," Leo muttered, and they all clicked their glasses together.

"Cheers."

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

EIGHT MONTH LATER, CITY HOSPITAL*

The sky shook dangerously, the wind blew heavily, trees and everything shook because of the heavy rain that was about to fall.

The clouds clapped together, and the rain started pouring down.

Inside the ward, Joanna was panting heavily, she was in labor, tears filled her eyes as she looked at Newton, who was beside her. He kissed her tears away.

"You're gonna be fine, you can do this," Newton gave her a word of encouragement.

"Please hold my hand," Joanna said, and he held her hand.

"Just know I love you, Joanna. I have always," Newton said, as the doctor asked her to push.

"One, two, three, push!" the doctor screamed, and Joanna pushed. Tears slowly escaped her eyes she was sweating profusely.

"You're getting there, you just have to push one more time, and then we're done," the nurse said. Joanna looked at Newton  her loud panting increased.

"I'm here for you, trust me when I say I cherish every fucking moment with you. And the day I found out you were pregnant, that was the happiest day of my life," Newton said, and she held his hand tighter and pushed.

The baby's head popped out, and the doctor smiled.

"Congratulations, you did it!" the doctor said, and Newton smiled.

The doctor handed the tiny little creature to him, and tears escaped his eyes... They were tears of joy.

Joanna opened her eyes, and the first thing her eyes caught was her baby... a baby boy.

She looked at her family they were three now... Her, Newton, and their baby joy. She prayed that no evil eyes would cast themselves on her family, which she was going to create.

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

рқ‘¬рқ‘·рқ‘°рқ‘ірқ‘¶рқ‘®рқ‘јрқ‘¬*

Years have passed, and Piper and Kiss are now college students.

Kiss is in his final year (400 level) while Piper is in her second year (200l) at Harvard University.

After many years, Newton finally agreed to let Kiss and Piper date, but warned Kiss not to hurt his sister or face the consequences.

Nelly was recently released from jail and is trying to get accepted into college, but it's proving difficult.

Angel and Jimmy relocated to Paris, Angel's dream country, and got married with a beautiful ceremony. They have a four-year-old daughter and are living happily.

Dorothy opened her own boutique and is doing well, having learned to let go of hatred and jealousy.

Leo confessed his love to Jarvis, and they have been dating for three years, preparing for marriage.

"Hey big bro, would you get your @ss over here?" Moanna called as she ran upstairs to his room.

She's Joanna's second child and first daughter. She opened the door to see her brother Nikki reading a novel.

"Oh my, what's the title of the novel?" Moanna jumped on the bed and asked.

"Why, thought you don't like novels, you said it bores you?" Nikki said, and Moanna smacked his head.

"Did you just smack my head? Have you forgotten I'm the senior here?" Nikki asked.

"I know, dummy anyway, Mom sent for us downstairs," Moanna said, and before Nikki knew it, she had run down the stairs, with him following.

"Mom, help me!" Moanna ran and hid behind Joanna's back.

"Mom, did you see that little brat?" Nikki asked Joanna.

"What did she do this time?" Joanna asked.

"Can you believe she smacked my head? She's always acting as if she's the senior  then I need to bring her ego down... I need to make her realize that I'm the senior," Nikki said.

"I would have been the senior, but you stole that from me," Moanna pointed out, sticking out her tongue.

"How?" Nikki asked.

"Because you and nature cheated me," Moanna said.

Joanna stared at both of them, knowing that if she didn't stop them, they would continue arguing like cats and dogs. 

"Okay, enough of your arguments," Joanna said, placing Moanna on top of the dining chair while Nikki sat on it.

"Where's Dad, Mom?" Moanna asked.

"He called to tell me he's going to be late," Joanna muttered, and the two of them sighed. She served them dinner, and they began eating...

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Joanna closed her laptop, having decided to try something new. As a writer, she was now busy plotting the story of her life, and she had chosen to title it "Sweet Pains".

It was a story of pains from the very beginning, and she glanced back to the time Newton found out she wasn't Jarvis and how he treated her badly. But those pains had turned to love in a way she never expected.

The door squeaked, and Newton stepped out of the bathroom, having returned moments earlier.

"Four eyes," he called, and Joanna walked over to him and hugged him.

"You can never get tired of calling me that name, can you?" she asked.

"Never, the name is now a part of me." Newton muttered, 

They walked to the bed, and Joanna lay on top of him.

"Everything that happens between us, it was worth it - being with you, loving you - it was all worth it," Newton muttered.

"Describe us in one word," Joanna said.

"FOREVER," Newton replied, and truly, their love lasted till forever. 

It proved that love can overcome every pain and trial if only you're ready to fight for it.

                           рҹҘҖ THE END рҹҘҖ

Wine, chocolates and flowers in his hands.
I watched his heart break at the sight of me standing up off of DylanвҖҷs cock. I could see the tears behind his glasses. He put his apartment keys on the counter. Threw the flowers into the dustbin, threw the chocolates on the counter and smashed the bottle on the door on his way out. A red stain was left on the door that reminded me of how I had chosen Lust over Love.
I remember how I searched for him but he just disappeared. No traces of where to. I felt depressed for an entire month. Looking for him and handing out missing person fliers, dreading the worst-case scenario. Every morning praying the news that he drove himself off a cliff or drank himself to death wouldnвҖҷt reach my door. 
I was learning to not blame myself, thinking I had moved on and found happiness with Dylan when I heard news of Alex moving back into town. I left work without a single second thought and drove to his old house with my grip getting tighter around the wheel the closer I got.
I ran out and found a moving company carrying his furniture into a truck. I stood numb and looked around. Then I saw himвҖҰ..

His eyes were grey now, the light brown eyes, gone.
Dreadlocks tied behind his head.  
Tattoos scattered on his forearms.
His light skin had turned caramel.
He was definitely more muscular and dressed in an all-black outfit with a few top buttons unpinned.

I hope she doesnвҖҷt think fucking means weвҖҷre back together.

Did I still care about that vixen?

Why did I even answer her call?

Why did I show up for her? 
I sat at the counter and flung my jacket over the armrest.
вҖңHey Janice, can you pack eight bottles of Jim Beam in a box and get someone to take it to my car outside, pour a glass for me, on rocks pleaseвҖқ, I said scrolling through my phone.   
A sweet but cheap perfume caught my nose and I had to look, next to me was an Asian looking girl with braidsвҖҰ..
I guess she did look nice.
She looked at me and smiled вҖңHeyвҖқ, she said wiping away at her smudged lipstickвҖҰ
вҖңHow you doing?вҖқ
вҖңIвҖҷve had better days I guessвҖқ

Janice whistled at me then slid the glass my way and I caught it like we rehearsed it all day.

I raised the glassвҖҰ..
Took a sipвҖҰвҖҰ

вҖңThis is why youвҖҷre a waitress but the most paid person hereвҖқ, I shouted over to Janice in praise. 
Scrolling through my merchandise account on Instagram, my phone rang, Larry, the manager at one of my hotels out of town.
Alex: Hello?
Larry: Good afternoon Mr Kosamaya, we had the pleasure of hosting a wedding for the harshest rated critic in town and just now he posted how he thinks we deserve six stars not four
Alex: Well thatвҖҷs good news, I saw the tweet just a few hours ago, seems you are doing a good job. IвҖҷll be there later tonight.	
Larry: Alright sir IвҖҷll call for the board to be in the boardroom by seven
Alex: Alright, fine by me, IвҖҷll have to call you later Larry
I picked up my glass and ran it down, the burning sensation in my throat woke me up and I stood to leave. 
It was pouring outside. No signs of stopping anytime soon. Unfortunately I only had a Bentley umbrella and it came with the car. I had taken the Cullinan today.
Sigh.
I covered my hair with my jacket. After asking some other hun to wash and blow-dry my hair after we had broken her bed was something I wasnвҖҷt trying to do again. I rushed to my car and sat inside.

вҖңIвҖҷm going through a little rough patch, canвҖҷt keep a decent job because IвҖҷm not from around the hood, so the projectsвҖҰ..thatвҖҷs all I can manage right nowвҖқ
вҖңYou donвҖҷt look like youвҖҷre going through a rough patch thoughвҖқ
вҖңYou mean that?вҖқ
вҖңYeah you look too good to beвҖқ
I saw her melt into the seat and she was quiet for a moment, trying to stop smiling.
вҖңHey, I got a little proposal for youвҖқ, I continued 
вҖңYeah? What is it?вҖқ
вҖңI need new kitchen staff at one of my hotels, so if you work for me IвҖҷll pay you and give you a free roomвҖқ
вҖңWhy would you do that for a stranger?вҖқ
I stopped at a red light then looked at her, вҖңI donвҖҷt bring random people into my cars and Im feeling like a good person todayвҖқ, I said before going on with the drive.
вҖңWhen do I start?вҖқ, she whispered looking at her heals.

Chapter 3

Narration

Matt is in his living room, sitting on a couch coated with design silk, he sits and thinks

Matt thoughts: She is pretty, I want her as mine and mine only, but first i need to get to know her more. (He stood up and walked over to his bedroom to take a shower, he had to wash himself because he was thinking of thing he wasn't supposed to)

В°В°Phone rings while Matt is in the bathroomВ°В°

(Matt walks out some minutes later wearing a robe, his blonde hair wet and draping, his tattoos on his back amd neck telling their stories, his aqua blue eyes glistening with water)

 He picks up his phone, checked it and dialed the number that called him previously

Unknown caller: Matt, get your ass down here, you have a job to do and make it quick (The voice icy and thick spoke through the phone)
Matt: Alright, I'm coming, gimme a sec

( Matt said as he hung up his phone, his gaze cold and calculating, he wore leather pants and a jacket and locked his apartment, Ellie's face crossing his mind one last time as he left his apartment)

Matt rode his motorcycle all the way down town in the middle of the night, his speed increasing at every change in gear, he sped up in the moonlight.

Matt reached a club on the other end of the town, he looked at the guards guarding the entrance and they let him in almost immediately.

Unknown: You are finally here, i thought you wouldn't come but here you are, anyway down to business, I got intel that you are being spied on, you have to be very careful, if not our whole operation will be shut down.

Matt: Oh really, a spy, i wonder who that could be, well no problem anyway cause i will be extra careful. Is that all you called me for? (He asked wanting to leave as soon as possible)

Unknown: Yes that is all, you can leave now

Matt thoughts: Urgh, why didn't this man discuss it over the phone, he wasted my time.

He hopped on his bike and zoomed into the night, he took the long way, rising for hours to clear his head, his focus on the road as his thoughts began to run wild.

His mind drifted back to Ellie, the way she talked, the way she moved, all was a turn on for him, he never liked anyone and Ellie was the first, yeah he may had f##### some girls in the past but he never liked any of them, they were just toys to him, he liked Ellie or maybe even something deeper than like.

He got home, took another shower and went straight to bed probably dreaming of Ellie.

The next day, Matt got dressed for school, entered his BMW and drove into the school's parking lot, he parked his car and entered the school building. His eyes scanning the school looking for the spy, he walked casually towards his classroom, still on high alert.

He met Ellie again in class and his heart skipped several beats. He sat down by her side, inhaling her perfume scent, getting lost in it's intoxicating scent, Ellie snapped him out of it with her fingers.

Ellie: Earth to Matt, you there? (She asked looking at him with a confused expression, Matt smiled and nodded, then he looked away from her as the teacher walked in taking them their first lesson for the day).

During the lesson, Ellie's handkerchief fell on the ground by accident, while she wasn't looking, Matt bent over and picked the handkerchief inhaling it's scent, he started thinking dirty thoughts then he snapped out of it, tucking the handkerchief in his pocket so Ellie wouldn't see it, this was just the beginning of his newfound obsession.

She's Joanna's second child and first daughter. She opened the door to see her brother Nikki reading a novel.

"Oh my, what's the title of the novel?" Moanna jumped on the bed and asked.

"Why, thought you don't like novels, you said it bores you?" Nikki said, and Moanna smacked his head.

"Did you just smack my head? Have you forgotten I'm the senior here?" Nikki asked.

"I know, dummy anyway, Mom sent for us downstairs," Moanna said, and before Nikki knew it, she had run down the stairs, with him following.

"Mom, help me!" Moanna ran and hid behind Joanna's back.

"Mom, did you see that little brat?" Nikki asked Joanna.

"What did she do this time?" Joanna asked.

"Can you believe she smacked my head? She's always acting as if she's the senior  then I need to bring her ego down... I need to make her realize that I'm the senior," Nikki said.

"I would have been the senior, but you stole that from me," Moanna pointed out, sticking out her tongue.

"How?" Nikki asked.

"Because you and nature cheated me," Moanna said.

Joanna stared at both of them, knowing that if she didn't stop them, they would continue arguing like cats and dogs. 

"Okay, enough of your arguments," Joanna said, placing Moanna on top of the dining chair while Nikki sat on it.

"Where's Dad, Mom?" Moanna asked.

"He called to tell me he's going to be late," Joanna muttered, and the two of them sighed. She served them dinner, and they began eating...

р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“р–Ө“

Joanna closed her laptop, having decided to try something new. As a writer, she was now busy plotting the story of her life, and she had chosen to title it "Sweet Pains".

It was a story of pains from the very beginning, and she glanced back to the time Newton found out she wasn't Jarvis and how he treated her badly. But those pains had turned to love in a way she never expected.

The door squeaked, and Newton stepped out of the bathroom, having returned moments earlier.

"Four eyes," he called, and Joanna walked over to him and hugged him.

"You can never get tired of calling me that name, can you?" she asked.

"Never, the name is now a part of me." Newton muttered, 

They walked to the bed, and Joanna lay on top of him.

"Everything that happens between us, it was worth it - being with you, loving you - it was all worth it," Newton muttered.

"Describe us in one word," Joanna said.

"FOREVER," Newton replied, and truly, their love lasted till forever. 

It proved that love can overcome every pain and trial if only you're ready to fight for it.

                           рҹҘҖ THE END рҹҘҖ
